tasks.label: Build & Deploy Analyzers
tasks.detail: Build Socitas.ReviewerCop and copy DLLs to the AL extension's analyzer folder
tasks.command: dotnet build src/Socitas.ReviewerCop.Common/Socitas.ReviewerCop.Common.csproj --configuration Release --no-restore && dotnet build src/Socitas.ReviewerCop/Socitas.ReviewerCop.csproj --configuration Release --no-restore && AL_EXT=$(ls -d ~/.vscode-server/extensions/ms-dynamics-smb.al-*/bin/Analyzers 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1) && cp src/Socitas.ReviewerCop.Common/bin/Release/net8.0/Socitas.ReviewerCop.Common.dll src/Socitas.ReviewerCop/bin/Release/net8.0/Socitas.ReviewerCop.dll "$AL_EXT/" && echo "Deployed to $AL_EXT"

tasks.label: Restore
tasks.detail: Restore NuGet packages for the solution

tasks.label: Build & Deploy Analyzers (with restore)
tasks.detail: Restore, build and deploy in one step
